actions.script: if (!rr?.rendered || !rr?.pdfBytes) { ec.web.response.sendError(500, rr?.message ?: 'Error renderizando DTE PDF') return } ec.web.response.setContentType('application/pdf') ec.web.response.setHeader('Content-Disposition', "inline; filename=\"DTE-${dteEmisionId}.pdf\"") ec.web.response.setContentLength(((byte[]) rr.pdfBytes).length) ec.web.response.outputStream.write((byte[]) rr.pdfBytes)
